summary: Dashboard project with dark mode contrast fix in progress. Text, labels, and section headings were not visible when dark mode was enabled.
architectural_notes: Dark mode must ensure sufficient contrast for all text, labels, and section headings on widgets and sections.

existing_features.title: Fix dark mode contrast so that all text, labels, values, and headings inside KPI cards, chart widgets, and dashboard sections are clearly visible when dark mode is enabled. Ensure CSS custom properties and Tailwind utility classes correctly resolve to high-contrast foreground colors against dark backgrounds across all widget and section components.

projectName: Fix dark mode text contrast on widgets and sections
